title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Structure Brief: Accounting Method
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 accounting method increment in an amortized-cost ledger and implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
